query:
UPDATE pgmq_queue
            SET
                failed_attempts = failed_attempts + 1,
                status = (CASE
                    WHEN failed_attempts + 1 >= $1 THEN $2::int ELSE $3::int
                END),
                scheduled_for = (CASE
                    WHEN failed_attempts + 1 < $1 THEN $4 ELSE scheduled_for
                END),
                updated_at = $5
            WHERE id = $6
